_publications._publicationTitle: Induction of apoptosis in neurofibromatosis type 1 malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cell lines by a combination of novel farnesyl transferase inhibitors and lovastatin.

_contextSnippet: The combination treatment results in an increased percentage of cells in G1, and a significant percentage of cells undergoing apoptosis, compared to the control cultures
details: Combination treatment resulted in increased percentage of cells in G1 and significant percentage of cells undergoing apoptosis compared to controls
